API Reference

All endpoints require authentication via session cookie or x-api-key header.

GET/api/bookList all books
POST/api/bookCreate a book
GET/api/book/[uuid]Get a book
PUT/api/book/[uuid]Update a book
DELETE/api/book/[uuid]Delete a book
GET/api/book/chapter?book_uuid=List chapters of a book
POST/api/book/chapterCreate a chapter
GET/api/book/chapter/[uuid]Get a chapter
PUT/api/book/chapter/[uuid]Update a chapter
DELETE/api/book/chapter/[uuid]Delete a chapter
GET/api/book/sentence?chapter_uuid=List sentences of a chapter
POST/api/book/sentenceCreate a sentence
GET/api/book/sentence/[uuid]Get a sentence
PUT/api/book/sentence/[uuid]Update a sentence
DELETE/api/book/sentence/[uuid]Delete a sentence
GET/api/book/[uuid]/markdownGet full book content as markdown
POST/api/cardCreate a flashcard
GET/api/apikeyList API keys
POST/api/apikeyGenerate a new API key
DELETE/api/apikey?uuid=Revoke an API key
